scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --raw "npm run dev --prefix apps/web" "npm run dev --prefix apps/api" "npm run dev --prefix apps/pocketbase"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix apps/web && npm run build --prefix apps/web && npm install --prefix apps/api
scripts.lint: concurrently --raw "npm run lint --prefix apps/web" "npm run lint --prefix apps/api"
